info.title: Book Rental API
info.description: JSON:API for the book rental library. Responses use the `application/vnd.api+json` media type with a `data` envelope; errors use a top-level `errors[]` array. Authenticate with a Sanctum bearer token obtained from `register` or `login`.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

parameters.name: filter[title]
parameters.description: Filter by a partial, case-insensitive title match.

parameters.name: filter[author]
parameters.description: Filter by a partial, case-insensitive author match.

parameters.name: filter[available]
parameters.description: When truthy, only books with at least one available copy are returned.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field: one of title, author, published_year, created_at. Prefix with "-" for descending (e.g. -published_year).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the paginated result set (15 books per page).

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

source.description: Present for validation errors; a JSON Pointer into the request body.
